arts.ttl: FPL notes: Pedro assist, benchings + Bournemouth attackers
arts.sum: Key takeaways for Spurs, Brighton, Bournemouth and Fulham The post FPL notes: Pedro assist, benchings + Bournemouth attackers appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Spurs' Postecoglou confronts angry fans after loss
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou confronted fans after his side's tame 1-0 Premier League defeat at Bournemouth on Thursday which increased the pressure on the Australian.

arts.ttl: Tottenham injury news: Ange Postecoglou reveals extent to hamstring injury sustained by Ben Davies
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou reveals the extent to Ben Davies's hamstring injury sustained in the 1-0 defeat to Bournemouth.

Ange: "Like I said, we started the game well, but football is a game where you try to control it and dictate it to play the way you want to, but when you give goals away like we did tonight, and we have done that consistently not just with set-pieces but just in general this year, it just gives the opportunity then for the opposition, particularly a team like Bournemouth, to play on the counter which is what they want to do. When you are coming to a place like Bournemouth the one thing you do know is it’s going to be a tough game with the conditions and the way they play, they sort of keep under control the whole time.

arts.ttl: Son Heung-min Tottenham substitute decision vs Bournemouth explained by Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: The 32-year-old's form was a talking point when speaking to the media on Wednesday and Postecoglou revealed that people should be wary about writing his player off . Ange Postecoglou has revealed that his decision to drop Son Heung-min from the Tottenham team to take on Bournemouth is simply down to rotation.

arts.ttl: Tottenham's next five fixtures compared to Arsenal, Chelsea and other Premier League rivals
arts.sum: December 19 vs Manchester United (H) at 8pm - Carabao Cup Come out of this run with five points or more in the Premier League, a win in the Europa League and progression in the Carabao Cup, Tottenham will be delighted.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou cops 'direct feedback' in Spurs fan confrontation
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou vowed to keep fighting to revive Tottenham's fortunes after receiving "some direct feedback" from disgruntled fans following a limp 1-0 Premier League loss to Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Ange confronts Spurs fans at full-time | 'They gave me direct feedback'
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur boss Ange Postecoglou reveals that he received 'direct feedback' from disappointed fans after his side lost 1-0 at Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth 1-0 Tottenham: Dean Huijsen nets winner for the Cherries as problems mount for Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Spurs looked flat and tired and were fortunate not to concede more than the one scored in the first half by teenage centre-half Dean Huijsen

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou ‘determined to get it right’ as Tottenham’s struggles continue
arts.sum: Postecoglou was booed and heckled by a frustrated away end after a 1-0 defeat to Bournemouth
